message:
fix(fm-cli): apply clippy lints across CLI source and tests

Inline format arguments (format!("{}", x) -> format!("{x}")), remove
unnecessary .clone() calls on values that are not used after the move,
simplify raw string literals (r#"..."# -> r"...") where no special
characters require the extended syntax, simplify match arm patterns
(e.g. (Pass, Pass) | (NoBaseline, Pass) -> (Pass | NoBaseline, Pass)),
and remove needless Result wrapper from capture_perf_environment which
is infallible.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
